name: par3
description: Streaming PAR3-style erasure coding for Cloudflare Workers and local Node.js repair workflows

scripts.benchmark: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:native && node --experimental-wasm-modules ./scripts/benchmark.mjs
scripts.build:native: CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_CODEGEN_UNITS=1 CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_LTO=thin RUSTFLAGS="${RUSTFLAGS:+$RUSTFLAGS }-C target-cpu=native" napi build --release --features napi --output-dir ./lib
scripts.test:js: npm run build:wasm && node --experimental-wasm-modules --test _worker_test.js bin/main_test.js examples/fetch_encode_repair_gzip_test.js lib/envelope_test.js lib/mod_test.js lib/multipart_test.js
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run test:js
scripts.test:watch: npm run build:wasm && node --experimental-wasm-modules --test --watch _worker_test.js bin/main_test.js examples/fetch_encode_repair_gzip_test.js lib/envelope_test.js lib/mod_test.js lib/multipart_test.js
